economic_notes: First Nation operates a Power Authority providing electrical power to community residents. Economic Development segment includes small business centre and business services. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (Casino Rama funds) generates revenue. Power Authority has significant energy accounts receivable of $4,115,487 fully allowanced for doubtful accounts.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) physical inventory quantities could not be verified; (2) energy sales completeness and energy accounts receivable existence could not be verified - $4,115,487 energy receivables fully allowanced; (3) tangible capital assets may be understated due to unrecorded assets not yet fully identified. No long-term debt outstanding at year end. No schedule of remuneration included in available text. OSR calculation unclear as most revenue lines appear to be government transfers; Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (Casino Rama) and energy sales treated as own-source but could not be fully separated from transfers in available data - osr set to 0 pending full classification. Chief and Council remuneration shown as $429,612 aggregate in expenses by object but no individual breakdown schedule provided. Financial statements dated October 18, 2022 for March 31, 2021 year-end - significant delay. First Nation did not comply with FNFTA posting deadline.
